action.reasoning: Observation: First epoch gave dev_eer=0.0095 but test_eer=0.1066, showing big domain gap. Test data has telephony codecs (a-law, mu-law, G.722, GSM, OPUS) not present in train. Analysis: Need stronger codec augmentation that mimics actual test conditions. Should add real codec simulation (mu-law, a-law encoding/decoding, telephony bandlimit). Also should train longer with WavLM-large (better for speech tasks). Decision: Add proper codec augmentation (mu-law, a-law, narrowband filtering) and train more epochs. Keep XLS-R for now since it worked. Also use RawBoost-style augmentation.
